---
title: "01. No11 与知止之美"
subtitle: "No11 and the Beauty of Knowing When to Stop"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 1
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `fibonacci_cardinality` across 道德经、易经、黄帝内经、孙子兵法、几何原本 and the Gen 2 papers."
---

## 定理锚点 / Lean Anchors

| 角色 | 定理 |
|---|---|
| 主定理核 | `fibonacci_cardinality` |
| 支撑定理 1 | `fibonacci_cardinality_recurrence` |
| 支撑定理 2 | `goldenMean_characteristic_recurrence` |
| 支撑定理 3 | `goldenMeanAdjacency_cayley_hamilton` |

## 文本导航 / Classical Works

- [道德经](../tao-te-ching/index.qmd)
- [易经](../i-ching/index.qmd)
- [孙子兵法](../sunzi/index.qmd)
- [黄帝内经](../huangdi-neijing/index.qmd)
- [几何原本](../elements/index.qmd)

## 论文导航 / Gen 2 Papers

- [A Sharp Three-Window Threshold and Finite-Memory Conjugacy in Fibonacci Stabilization](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity.qmd)
- [Finite-Window Rigidity in Fibonacci Numeration](../../science/gen2/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics.qmd)

## Infographic

![synthesis_01_no11_golden_mean_shift Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_01_no11_golden_mean_shift_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_01_no11_golden_mean_shift_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_01_no11_golden_mean_shift_infographic.png)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_01_no11_golden_mean_shift_video.mp4)
- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_01_no11_golden_mean_shift_slides.pdf)

## 正文 / Essay

{{< include articles/synthesis_01_no11_golden_mean_shift.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
